glosses.en: female doctor; woman with a doctorate
glosses.vi: bác sĩ nữ; tiến sĩ nữ

sentences.target: Die Doktorin ruft später noch einmal an.
sentences.reading: /diː dɔkˈtoːʁɪn ʁuːft ˈʃpɛːtɐ nɔx ˈaɪ̯nmaːl an./

translations.de: Die Doktorin ruft später noch einmal an.
translations.ipa: /diː dɔkˈtoːʁɪn ʁuːft ˈʃpɛːtɐ nɔx ˈaɪ̯nmaːl an./
translations.en: The doctor will call again later.
translations.es: La doctora volverá a llamar más tarde.
translations.pt: A médica vai ligar de novo mais tarde.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ sẽ gọi lại sau.
translations.nl: De dokter belt later nog een keer.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर बाद में फिर फोन करेगी।
translations.el: Η γιατρός θα καλέσει ξανά αργότερα.
translations.ro: Doctorița va suna din nou mai târziu.
translations.ja: 医者は後でまた電話します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking a feminine nominative singular noun; determiner of the subject NP 'Doktorin'.
Feminine noun in nominative singular; subject/agent of the clause.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present) forming a separable verb with the particle 'an'; head of the predicate.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates the action happens at a later time.
Adverb expressing addition/repetition; combined with 'einmal' to mean 'once more/again'.
Frequency adverb meaning 'once'; with 'noch' gives the sense 'once again'.
Separable verbal particle belonging to 'anrufen'; placed clause-final in a main clause.

sentences.target: Meine Doktorin schaut sich das jetzt an.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə dɔkˈtoːʁɪn ʃaʊ̯t zɪç das jɛtst an./

translations.de: Meine Doktorin schaut sich das jetzt an.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə dɔkˈtoːʁɪn ʃaʊ̯t zɪç das jɛtst an./
translations.en: My doctor is taking a look at it now.
translations.es: Mi doctora lo está revisando ahora.
translations.it: La mia dottoressa lo sta esaminando adesso.
translations.ko: 제 의사가 지금 그걸 확인하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的医生现在正在看这个。
translations.yue: 我嘅醫生而家喺度睇緊呢樣嘢。
translations.pt: Minha médica está analisando isso agora.
translations.he: הרופאה שלי בודקת את זה עכשיו.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ của tôi đang xem cái này bây giờ.
translations.hi: मेरी डॉक्टर अभी इसे देख रही है।
translations.el: Η γιατρός μου το εξετάζει τώρα.
translations.nb: Legen min ser på det nå.
translations.sv: Min läkare tittar på det nu.
translations.cs: Moje doktorka si to teď prohlíží.
translations.da: Min læge kigger på det nu.
translations.ja: 私の医者は今それを見ています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Doktorin'.
Feminine noun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present) in a separable construction with 'an'; part of the reflexive verb phrase.
Reflexive pronoun (3rd person), form used for accusative/dative; core argument co-referential with the subject in the reflexive construction.
Demonstrative/neutral pronoun functioning as a direct object; refers to some previously mentioned thing.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates current time.
Separable verbal particle belonging to 'anschauen'; positioned at clause end in a main clause.

sentences.target: Ich warte vor der Praxis meiner Doktorin.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ ˈpʁaksɪs ˈmaɪ̯nɐ dɔkˈtoːʁɪn./

translations.de: Ich warte vor der Praxis meiner Doktorin.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ ˈpʁaksɪs ˈmaɪ̯nɐ dɔkˈtoːʁɪn./
translations.en: I’m waiting in front of my doctor’s office.
translations.es: Estoy esperando frente a la consulta de mi doctora.
translations.fr: J’attends devant le cabinet de ma médecin.
translations.it: Sto aspettando davanti allo studio della mia dottoressa.
translations.ko: 제 의사 선생님의 진료실 앞에서 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在我医生的诊所外等着。
translations.yue: 我喺我醫生嘅診所門口等緊。
translations.ru: Я жду перед кабинетом моего врача.
translations.pt: Estou esperando em frente ao consultório da minha médica.
translations.he: אני מחכה מול המרפאה של הרופאה שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi trước phòng khám của bác sĩ tôi.
translations.nl: Ik wacht voor de praktijk van mijn dokter.
translations.uk: Я чекаю перед кабінетом своєї лікарки.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी डॉक्टर के क्लिनिक के बाहर इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Περιμένω έξω από το ιατρείο της γιατρού μου.
translations.nb: Jeg venter utenfor legekontoret til legen min.
translations.id: Saya sedang menunggu di depan klinik dokter saya.
translations.sv: Jag väntar utanför min läkares mottagning.
translations.ro: Aștept în fața cabinetului doctoriței mele.
translations.da: Jeg venter udenfor min læges klinik.
translations.ja: 主治医のクリニックの前で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person singular) in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (1st person singular, present); intransitive predicate 'to wait'.
Preposition taking dative; introduces a prepositional phrase expressing location.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Praxis' governed by 'vor'.
Feminine noun; object of the preposition 'vor' in dative; refers to the doctor's office.
Possessive determiner in genitive feminine singular; modifier indicating the possessor of 'Praxis'.
Feminine noun in genitive singular; possessor within the NP 'Praxis meiner Doktorin'.

sentences.target: Die Doktorin erklärt mir die Ergebnisse ruhig.
sentences.reading: /diː dɔkˈtoːʁɪn ɛʁˈklɛːʁt miːɐ̯ diː ˈɛʁɡeːbnɪsə ˈʁuːɪç./

translations.de: Die Doktorin erklärt mir die Ergebnisse ruhig.
translations.ipa: /diː dɔkˈtoːʁɪn ɛʁˈklɛːʁt miːɐ̯ diː ˈɛʁɡeːbnɪsə ˈʁuːɪç./
translations.en: The doctor explains the results to me calmly.
translations.es: La doctora me explica los resultados con calma.
translations.fr: La médecin m’explique calmement les résultats.
translations.it: La dottoressa mi spiega i risultati con calma.
translations.zh-Hans: 医生平静地向我解释结果。
translations.yue: 醫生冷靜咁同我解釋結果。
translations.pt: A médica me explica os resultados com calma.
translations.he: הרופאה מסבירה לי את התוצאות ברוגע.
translations.tr: Doktor bana sonuçları sakin bir şekilde açıklıyor.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ bình tĩnh giải thích kết quả cho tôi.
translations.nl: De dokter legt me de uitslagen rustig uit.
translations.hu: A doktornő nyugodtan elmagyarázza nekem az eredményeket.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर मुझे परिणाम शांतिपूर्वक समझाती हैं।
translations.el: Η γιατρός μού εξηγεί ήρεμα τα αποτελέσματα.
translations.nb: Legen forklarer resultatene rolig for meg.
translations.id: Dokter menjelaskan hasilnya kepada saya dengan tenang.
translations.sv: Läkaren förklarar resultaten lugnt för mig.
translations.ro: Doctorița îmi explică rezultatele cu calm.
translations.da: Lægen forklarer resultaterne roligt for mig.
translations.ja: 医者は落ち着いて私に結果を説明します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking a feminine nominative singular noun; determiner of the subject NP.
Feminine noun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present); ditransitive predicate taking a dative recipient and an accusative theme.
Personal pronoun (1st person singular) in dative; indirect object/recipient of 'erklärt'.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of 'Ergebnisse' as the direct object.
Plural noun in accusative; direct object (theme) of 'erklärt'.
Manner adverb modifying the verb; indicates the explanation is done calmly.
